name: Shrimp or Tuna Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Shrimp or 2 small cans Tuna
1 package Unflavored Gelatin, dissolved in Water as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in water.
2. Heat undiluted tomato soup; add gelatin and stir well until dissolved.
3. Mash cream cheese and add to the soup, continuing to heat until the cheese is fully dissolved.
4. Allow the mixture to cool.
5. Fold in mayonnaise, shrimp or tuna, peppers, celery, onion, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.
6. Mix thoroughly and pour into a well-oiled mold.
7. Enjoy!
